parameters.content:
## Error Spike Translator

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set ERROR_SPIKE_EMAIL_TO
3. Feed error log data or alerting webhook payload
4. LLM translates technical error spikes into plain-English impact statements for PMs
5. Approval gate before PM and stakeholder notification

parameters.subject: =Production Incident: {{ $('Load Sample Error Spike').first().json.service }} — {{ $('Format Incident Report').first().json.meta.alert_at }}
